billing_help_entries.title: Pricing Overview
billing_help_entries.content: cycleCAD offers three pricing tiers: Free (€0), Pro (€49/month), and Enterprise (€299/month). Free includes basic features and 3 projects. Pro adds unlimited projects, 50GB storage, and CAM operations. Enterprise adds unlimited everything, custom branding, SSO, and self-hosting.

billing_help_entries.title: Free Tier
billing_help_entries.content: Free tier is perfect for getting started. You get 3 projects, 100 parts per project, 1 GB storage, and 20 AI requests per day. When you hit a limit, an upgrade prompt appears.

billing_help_entries.title: Upgrading to Pro
billing_help_entries.content: Click the Upgrade button, select Pro (€49/month or €468/year), and start your 14-day free trial. No credit card charged during trial. After 14 days, first charge of €49 is processed.

billing_help_entries.title: Upgrading to Enterprise
billing_help_entries.content: Enterprise tier (€299/month) includes unlimited collaborators, 500GB storage, custom branding, SSO, self-hosting, and 99.9% SLA. Perfect for teams and organizations. Contact sales for volume discounts.

billing_help_entries.title: Free Trial
billing_help_entries.content: New customers get a 14-day free trial of Pro features with no credit card required. Cancel anytime before day 15 with zero charges. If you don't cancel, first payment charged on day 15.

billing_help_entries.title: Managing Your Subscription
billing_help_entries.content: Access your subscription settings from Settings > Billing & Subscription. Here you can view usage, change billing cycle (monthly/yearly), download invoices, and manage your payment method.

billing_help_entries.title: Canceling Your Subscription
billing_help_entries.content: To cancel, go to Settings > Billing & Subscription and click 'Cancel Subscription'. Your access continues until the end of your current billing period. You can resubscribe anytime without penalty.

billing_help_entries.title: Usage Limits
billing_help_entries.content: Each tier has different limits. Free: 3 projects, 100 parts, 1GB storage. Pro: unlimited projects/parts, 50GB storage. Enterprise: unlimited everything. View your usage anytime in Settings > Billing.

billing_help_entries.title: Storage Limit Reached
billing_help_entries.content: When you reach your storage limit, you can't upload new files. Either delete existing files, or upgrade to a higher tier with more storage. Pro has 50GB, Enterprise has 500GB.

billing_help_entries.title: AI Requests Limit
billing_help_entries.content: Free tier: 20 AI requests per day. Pro: 500 per day. Enterprise: unlimited. Daily counter resets at midnight UTC. After reaching daily limit, requests are queued until tomorrow or upgrade to continue immediately.

billing_help_entries.title: STEP Import Size Limit
billing_help_entries.content: Free tier: max 30MB. Pro: max 500MB. Enterprise: unlimited. If file exceeds limit, import is rejected with message showing file size and upgrade suggestion.

billing_help_entries.title: Payment Methods
billing_help_entries.content: We accept Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and bank transfers. Add or update your payment method in Settings > Billing or via Stripe Customer Portal.

billing_help_entries.title: Payment Failed
billing_help_entries.content: If payment fails, you get a 7-day grace period to update your payment method. Reminder emails sent on days 1, 3, 5, 7. After 7 days, subscription is canceled if not resolved. Update payment in Settings > Billing.

billing_help_entries.title: Invoices & Receipts
billing_help_entries.content: Download invoices from Settings > Billing > Recent Invoices, or via Stripe Customer Portal. Invoices are standard business format with itemized charges, dates, and payment info. Suitable for expense reports.

billing_help_entries.title: Tax & VAT
billing_help_entries.content: Tax is applied based on your location. EU customers pay VAT. US customers in certain states pay sales tax. Tax is calculated and shown at checkout before final price.

billing_help_entries.title: Promo Codes & Discounts
billing_help_entries.content: Apply promo codes at checkout. Common codes: STUDENT20 (students), NONPROFIT30 (nonprofits), ANNUAL20 (yearly, auto-applied). Check email or Discord for exclusive codes.

billing_help_entries.title: Annual Billing Discount
billing_help_entries.content: Choose yearly billing at checkout for 20% discount. Pro: €468/year (€39/month vs €49). Enterprise: €2,868/year (€239/month vs €299). Discount auto-applied, no code needed.

billing_help_entries.title: Change Billing Cycle
billing_help_entries.content: Change between monthly and yearly billing anytime via Stripe Customer Portal (Settings > Billing > Manage Subscription). Changes take effect on next billing date, no mid-cycle adjustments.

billing_help_entries.title: Export Usage Report
billing_help_entries.content: Export your usage data as CSV from Settings > Billing > Export Usage Report. Includes all metrics, current usage, limits, and subscription status. Great for tracking or team reports.

billing_help_entries.title: Collaborators & Team Access
billing_help_entries.content: Free: no collaborators. Pro: up to 10 collaborators. Enterprise: unlimited. Invite team members from Project > Collaborators. Each person needs their own account.

billing_help_entries.title: Self-Hosting
billing_help_entries.content: Enterprise tier includes self-hosting option. Run cycleCAD on your own servers with Docker. Full data privacy, custom domain, and control. Contact sales@cyclecad.com for setup.

billing_help_entries.title: Single Sign-On (SSO)
billing_help_entries.content: Enterprise tier includes SSO. Connect your company's identity provider (Microsoft, Google, Okta) so employees sign in with company credentials. Set up via Settings > Security > SSO.

billing_help_entries.title: Custom Branding
billing_help_entries.content: Enterprise tier includes custom branding. Add your company logo, use custom domain (e.g., cad.yourcompany.com), and white-label deployment. Configure in Settings > Branding.

billing_help_entries.title: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
billing_help_entries.content: Pro tier offers best-effort support. Enterprise tier includes 99.9% SLA with dedicated technical support, 4-hour response time, and quarterly check-ins.

billing_help_entries.title: Refund Policy
billing_help_entries.content: Pro tier includes 14-day free trial. After subscribing, subscriptions are non-refundable. You can cancel anytime to avoid future charges, but previous charges are not refunded.

billing_help_entries.title: Contact Billing Support
billing_help_entries.content: For billing questions: Free/Pro: support@cyclecad.com (24-48h response). Enterprise: dedicated support email (4h response). Also available on Discord at join.discord.gg/cyclecad.

billing_help_entries.title: Account Security
billing_help_entries.content: Keep your account secure. Use strong password, enable 2-factor authentication (Settings > Security), and never share billing info. Report suspicious activity to support immediately.

billing_help_entries.title: Student Discount
billing_help_entries.content: Students get 20% off Pro with valid .edu email. Use promo code STUDENT20 at checkout. Verify education status and code will be applied automatically.

billing_help_entries.title: Nonprofit Discount
billing_help_entries.content: Registered nonprofits get 30% off Pro. Use promo code NONPROFIT30 at checkout. Provide proof of 501(c)(3) status or equivalent.

billing_help_entries.title: Referral Program
billing_help_entries.content: Refer a friend and earn 25% credit. Share your referral link, when they subscribe, you both get €12 credit. Use code REFERRAL25 to share.

billing_help_entries.title: Change Billing Email
billing_help_entries.content: Update billing email in Stripe Customer Portal (Settings > Billing > Manage Subscription > Update billing info). Future invoices sent to new address. Old invoices still available in portal.

billing_help_entries.title: Data Privacy & GDPR
billing_help_entries.content: Your data is secure with us. We comply with GDPR and other privacy laws. For data requests or privacy concerns, contact privacy@cyclecad.com.
